zh.lifeSummary: 當John Radford於1570年出生在英國戴文德利時，他的父親John Radford II30歲，母親Mary Bennett25歲。他於1590年與Alice Leigh在英國戴文德利結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1662年在英國戴文洛可亞雷享年92歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Radford于1570年出生在英国戴文德利时，他的父亲John Radford II30岁，母亲Mary Bennett25岁。他于1590年与Alice Leigh在英国戴文德利结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1662年在英国戴文洛可亞雷享年92岁。

nameMeanings.name: Radford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from any of several places called Radford (Devon, Nottinghamshire, Oxfordshire, Somerset, Warwickshire, Worcestershire), Raddiford (Devon), Ratford (Sussex, Wiltshire), Redford (Angus, Fife, Midlothian, Dorset, Sussex), Retford (Nottinghamshire), Rodford (Gloucestershire), or Rudford (Gloucestershire). Most of these placenames appear to derive from Old English rēad ‘red’ + ford ‘ford’, though some are likely to derive from Old English hrēod ‘reed’ + ford (e.g. Rodford and Rudford (Gloucestershire)), and the Oxfordshire placename may derive from Old English rād ‘riding’ + ford, probably meaning ‘ford which can be crossed on horseback’. This English name has been established in Ireland (Wexford) since the 16th century.

variants.name: Redifer
meanings: Possibly English: variant of Reddiford, itself a variant of Radford .

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When John Radford was born in 1570, in Chudleigh, Devon, England, his father, John Radford II, was 30 and his mother, Mary Bennett, was 25. He married Alice Leigh in 1590, in Chudleigh, Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 5 daughters. He died in 1662, in Rockbeare, Devon, England, at the age of 92.

Il a épousé Alice Leigh en 1590, à Chudleigh, Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé en 1662, à Rockbeare, Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 92 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: John Radfordが1570年にイギリスデボンチウドレイグで生まれた時，父John Radford IIは30歳，母Mary Bennettは25歳であった。1590年にイギリスデボンチウドレイグでAlice Leighと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1662年にイギリスデボンロクベアアで92歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Radford(이)가 1570년 영국 데폰 c후들리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Radford II(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Bennett(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1590년 영국 데폰 c후들리에서 Alice Leigh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1662년 영국 데폰 록브이르에서 92세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Radford родился в 1570 г. в местности чудлиг, девон, Англия, его отцу по имени John Radford II было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Bennett, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Leigh в 1590 г. в местности чудлиг, девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер в 1662 г. в местности роккбир, девон, Англия в возрасте 92 лет.
